title: Pulsar (disambiguation)
content:
A '''[[Pulsar/Legends|pulsar]]''' was a type of [[Neutron star/Legends|neutron star]] whose brightness oscillated regularly.

Pulsar could also refer to:

==Canon==
*[[Bedlam Pulsar]]
*[[Din Pulsar]]
*[[Oolex pulsar]]
*[[Pulsar (clone trooper)|Pulsar]], a [[clone trooper]] in [[Tango Company]]

==Legends==
*[[Pulsar (Star Destroyer)|''Pulsar'']], an Imperial Star Destroyer
*[[Pulsar (DP20 frigate)|''Pulsar'']], a New Republic gunship
*[[Pulsar (Lancer-class)|''Pulsar'']], an Imperial ''Lancer''-class frigate
*[[Pulsar (clone trooper)/Legends|Pulsar]], a [[Tango Company/Legends|Tango Company]] [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]]
*''[[Pulsar Lines]]'', a passenger liner
*''[[Pulsar Skate]]'', a [[Baudo-class star yacht|''Baudo''-class star yacht]]
*[[Pulsar Station]]
*[[Pulsar Supertanker]]
*[[pulsar tracking]]
*''[[Scorching Pulsar]]'', a pirate starship
*Pulsars:
**[[Bedlam Pulsar/Legends|Bedlam Pulsar]]
**[[Din Pulsar/Legends|Din Pulsar]]
**[[Oolex Pulsar/Legends|Oolex Pulsar]]
**[[Thornhedge Pulsar]]
**[[Vestor Pulsar]]
